title: KM9-15.1.2.129SP05-OP001PF001AZ-15.1.2.155SP03-OP001PF001AZ_20260120151236
description:
Please plug in charger to OTA upgrade when power is lower than 50%.

Update Version:
KM9-15.1.2.155SP03(OP001PF001AZ)

Changed Functions:
1. Updated Google Security Patch to February 2026 for enhanced system security.

Fixed Issues:
1. Fixed issues where some translations were inaccurate to make expressions more natural and fluent.
2. Fixed known issues with carriers to improve call and network stability.
3. Fixed known issues with AI Gallery to improve its stability and running smoothness.
4. Fixed known issues with Ella in offline mode to improve call stability and voice quality.
5. Optimized for touch issues when windows overlapped in Picture-in-Picture mode, improving operational smoothness and overall user experience.

Reminding:
1. Optimized system stability and performance while fixing other issues.
2. Visit the TECNO SPOT forum (https://tspot.tecno.com) for more information.
